---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new tool, capability, or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? Who benefits?

## Proposal

What would the new behavior look like? If it's a new MCP tool, sketch the
inputs, outputs, and an example call.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about, and why is this one preferable?

## Additional context

Links to mapy.com API docs, related issues, prior art, etc.
